retrieved_result: Q: How to extend the task bar to multiple screens. "AK Alok Kumbhare asked on May 19, 2010Q: How to extend the task bar to multiple screens. I have multiple monitors setup for my PC and i want to extend the task bar to both the screens. Is there a way to do this in Win7? Reply I have the same question (643)Spirit X MS MVP replied on May 19, 2010MVP
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses extending the Windows taskbar across multiple screens, not database queries or optimization. It is unrelated to the query about optimizing database queries.
